name: movecertificate

scripts.build: rm -rf ./webroot/* && parcel build index.html -d webroot && javascript-obfuscator webroot --output webroot --compact true
scripts.build_push: rm -rf ./webroot/* && parcel build index.html -d webroot && javascript-obfuscator webroot --output webroot --compact true && scp ./webroot/*  root@192.168.1.4:/data/adb/modules/MoveCertificate/webroot/

author: iyue
description: The MoveCertificate web page is used to display and delete certificates.
